headline: P&L exposure: ₹63,000 Cr capex committed (growth asset), no direct revenue or margin risk
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; investment is direct operational expansion, not a procurement or supplier event.
Triggers BRSR disclosure obligations (SEBI), but no penalty or deadline breach; aligns with CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks.
No P/E compression or margin erosion; future revenue uplift possible, but no current revenue at risk.
